title: noExcessiveNestedCallbacks

import { Tabs, TabItem } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

<Tabs>
<TabItem label="JavaScript (and super languages)" icon="seti:javascript">
:::caution
This rule is part of the [nursery](/linter/#nursery) group. This means that it is experimental and the behavior can change at any time.
:::
## Summary
- Rule available since: `v2.4.14`
- Diagnostic Category: [`lint/nursery/noExcessiveNestedCallbacks`](/reference/diagnostics#diagnostic-category)
- This rule doesn't have a fix.
- The default severity of this rule is [**warning**](/reference/diagnostics#warning).
- Sources: 
  - Same as [`max-nested-callbacks`](https://eslint.org/docs/latest/rules/max-nested-callbacks)

## How to configure
```json title="biome.json"
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noExcessiveNestedCallbacks": "error"
			}
		}
	}
}

```
## Description
Enforce a maximum depth that callbacks can be nested.

Deeply nested callbacks make asynchronous control flow difficult to read and follow.
This rule reports callback functions nested beyond the configured limit.

## Examples

### Invalid

```js
foo1(function () {
    foo2(function () {
        foo3(function () {
            foo4(function () {
                foo5(function () {
                    foo6(function () {});
                });
            });
        });
    });
});
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text">code-block.js:6:26 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-excessive-nested-callbacks">lint/nursery/noExcessiveNestedCallbacks</a> ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━<br /><br />  <strong><span style="color: Orange;">⚠</span></strong> <span style="color: Orange;">This callback is nested too deeply.</span><br />  <br />    <strong>4 │ </strong>            foo4(function () &#123;<br />    <strong>5 │ </strong>                foo5(function () &#123;<br />  <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">&gt;</span></strong> <strong>6 │ </strong>                    foo6(function () &#123;&#125;);<br />   <strong>   │ </strong>                         <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><br />    <strong>7 │ </strong>                &#125;);<br />    <strong>8 │ </strong>            &#125;);<br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Callbacks nested 6 levels deep are harder to read and maintain. The configured maximum is 5.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Extract some callbacks into named functions to reduce nesting.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br /></code></pre>

### Valid

```js
foo1(handleFoo1);

function handleFoo1() {
    foo2(handleFoo2);
}
```

## Options

### max

The maximum callback nesting depth allowed (default: 5).

```json title='biome.json'
{
	"linter": {
		"rules": {
			"nursery": {
				"noExcessiveNestedCallbacks": {
					"options": {
						"max": 3
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

```

#### Invalid

```js
foo1(function () {
    foo2(function () {
        foo3(function () {
            foo4(function () {});
        });
    });
});
```

<pre class="language-text"><code class="language-text">code-block.js:4:18 <a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/rules/no-excessive-nested-callbacks">lint/nursery/noExcessiveNestedCallbacks</a> ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━<br /><br />  <strong><span style="color: Orange;">⚠</span></strong> <span style="color: Orange;">This callback is nested too deeply.</span><br />  <br />    <strong>2 │ </strong>    foo2(function () &#123;<br />    <strong>3 │ </strong>        foo3(function () &#123;<br />  <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">&gt;</span></strong> <strong>4 │ </strong>            foo4(function () &#123;&#125;);<br />   <strong>   │ </strong>                 <strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><strong><span style="color: Tomato;">^</span></strong><br />    <strong>5 │ </strong>        &#125;);<br />    <strong>6 │ </strong>    &#125;);<br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Callbacks nested 4 levels deep are harder to read and maintain. The configured maximum is 3.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">Extract some callbacks into named functions to reduce nesting.</span><br />  <br />  <strong><span style="color: lightgreen;">ℹ</span></strong> <span style="color: lightgreen;">This rule belongs to the nursery group, which means it is not yet stable and may change in the future. Visit </span><span style="color: lightgreen;"><a href="https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery">https://biomejs.dev/linter/#nursery</a></span><span style="color: lightgreen;"> for more information.</span><br />  <br /></code></pre>

#### Valid

```js
foo1(function () {
    foo2(function () {
        foo3(function () {});
    });
});
```
